failure.detail: Bower install failed - dropbox dependency repo (lavelle/dropbox.git) no longer exists (404). Without bower_components the app renders blank page. App requires ~40 bower dependencies including jQuery, Backbone, Marionette, RequireJS etc. Served app/index.html via static server but page is blank due to missing JS dependencies.

notes: Page loaded with title 'Laverna' and 30MB memory usage but content rendered blank. No bower_components directory exists - bower install failed on dropbox dependency. The bug (Dropbox Login Page broken) is ironically impossible to test because the Dropbox dependency repo itself is gone.
